summary: BLOCK-313 (ISO Modal Variant Art) and BLOCK-320 (MongoDB connection limits) testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: ISO modal shows album art (no blank squares), View More button visible with '34 remaining'. Search page displays ME! Taylor Swift variants with correct cover art including Picture Disc.

backend_health_endpoint.details: GET /api/health returns status='ok', pool.maxPoolSize=10, pool.minPoolSize=1, pool.db_status='connected'

backend_search_variants_cover_url.details: GET /api/search/variants?q=me!+taylor+swift returns 10 results, ALL have non-null cover_url (0 missing)

backend_vinyl_release_13900109.details: GET /api/vinyl/release/13900109 returns variant_overview with variant='Picture Disc', cover_url='https://i.discogs.com/...', artist='Taylor Swift, Brendon Urie', album='Me!'

backend_discogs_search_cover_url.details: GET /api/discogs/search?q=me!+taylor+swift returns 40 results, ALL have non-null cover_url (0 missing)

frontend_iso_modal_composer.details: ComposerBar ISO modal search shows 6 results with album art images (no blank squares). 'View More (34 remaining)' button visible below results.

frontend_search_variants_page.details: Search page /search?q=me!+taylor+swift shows ME! variants with album art. Picture Disc variant visible with tags. Albums and Artists sections populated.

context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK-313 ISO modal variant art fix verified: 1) Batch cover resolution in routes/search.py Lines 558-617 hydrates missing cover_url via records + discogs_releases collections + Discogs API fallback (max 3 calls). 2) Variant release endpoint routes/vinyl.py Lines 440-458 has cover_url fallback via sibling records/releases lookup. 3) MongoDB pool config in database.py Lines 22-35 sets maxPoolSize=10, minPoolSize=1. All tests pass - no blank covers visible in ISO modal or search pages.
